english: Step Back to Ride the Tiger
visual: Steps back into an empty stance with one hand raised above the head and the other lowered beside the hip, body turned at an angle.
motion_description: The person steps their left foot backward, transferring their weight onto the bent left leg to form an empty stance with the right toe lightly resting on the floor. As the weight shifts, the torso rotates slightly to the right while the right arm sweeps upward in a deliberate arc to finish raised above the head. Simultaneously, the left arm lowers steadily to hover beside the left hip, holding the posture briefly before the feet are brought together to close.
